feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Document and Reporting Compliance
feed.subtitle: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: DRC - No file type for message type TR_RECEIPT_PULL
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

eDocument (General) for DRC in Public Cloud: Handle Incoming Messages
When I run it, I get an error as follows. How can I solve this?
No file type for message type TR_RECEIPT_PULL found in the EDOMSGTYPEPULL view
Thanks everyone

entry.title: SAP eDocument installation
entry.content:
Hello Community,

We're eager to integrate the SAP E-Invoicing solution into our company's S4HANA On-premise system. As newcomers to this field, we're seeking guidance on accessing the solution. Do we need to acquire the SAP DRC solution alongside the E-Invoicing solution? What are the prerequisites for implementation, and how can we proceed with the installation process? Your assistance in navigating these queries would be greatly appreciated.

@erika_buson 

SAP Document and Reporting Compliance #

entry.title: Advance compliance reporting OutPut is data not Displayed
entry.content:
Hello to Mexico Solution with SAP ACR the Run Compliance Report is Executed in Development and Qas System Fine but in Production System the output with View Fortma Element is not working

 

 

The OutPut in PDF is Cutted 

In Development or Testing Enviroment show the Amounts even if the amount is 0.00 but in production the amounts are no Showed, there is the option Edit in the screen and the element let change de amounts, this option no display the elements to change the values.

Maybe some installation in Production is missing, Any Ideas?..

 

Regards and Thanks for your Support.

entry.title: Buttons missing in edocument cockpit
entry.content:
Hi guys,
i am currently facing a problem in the edocument cockpit for italy. There are only a few buttons shown in the edoc_cockpit, e.g. the most important button "submit" is also missing.
Is there a configuration in the SAP system missing? Did anyone face the same issue and found a solution?

entry.title: #COE KKS01 SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud need of Turkey: Generation of Electronic Delivery IDs BAdI
entry.content:
Hello,

We need to define different Electronic delivery IDs with our own logic for Turkey Electronic Deliverys. We couldnt find any BaDI or solution to solve that problem. Is there any solution on S/4HANA Public Cloud?

Thank you in advance

entry.title: #COE KKS01 SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud need of multiple pdf print feature on Edocument Cockpit
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We want to print different electronic deliveries or invoices by choosing at once. On the current screen its not posible to choose and print multiple pdfs at the same time. 

Is there any solution to multiple pdf print on Edocument Cockpit?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: How to attach multiple UUID numbers or original invoice number to CN/DN for DRC Malaysia e-Invoice?
entry.content:
Solution by SAP DRC is to insert the original invoice document number during the CN/DN creation in certain field depending on the generation of the CN/DN.

Meaning, if CN/DN posted from FI (FB75 or FB65), we have to insert the invoice number in the Header Text field. If it is posted from SD billing (VF01), the original number to insert in the Reference field. If posted from MM (MIRO), number to insert in the Header Text field.

Or we can insert the UUID number of the original invoice into the CN/DN edocument in edocument cockpit.

Please note that this is the solution provided by DRC for Malaysia e-Invoicing.

Creating and Submitting Electronic Customer Invoices to the Tax Authorities | SAP Help Portal

However, due to the limitation of characters for the fields suggested, we can only attached one original invoice number to CN/DN.

My question is how to attach multiple original invoice numbers or UUID number to one CN/DN before submission to IRBM?

entry.title: Mass download e-delivery document pdf output via DRC
entry.content:
Dear Community,

We're looking for an API for mass dowload e-delivery document pdf. Document and Reporting Compliance is used for e-processes and we need to display and print 20-50 e-delivery at one time, but system does not let. When we searched for similar scenerios, I faced with this billing process with same situation. However, I've checked the Business Accelerator Hub, I cannot find similar API for e-delivery. Could you please share your comments?

Thanks in advance for your support.

entry.title: TDD License for SAP DRC, Cloud Edition, + BTP App 8015570, Process for DE & SAP_COM_0854 Missing
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We have activated scope item 5XU in our SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud system and rented price material 8015570. Now we have access to SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, Cloud Edition in the BTP.

However, there is no option for Germany in the Activate processes app. In the Public Cloud ERP, we are also missing SAP_COM_0854 in the communication agreement set up. We have used the following help document:

Creating Communication Systems | SAP Help Portal and the 5XU test script from the process explorer. Which part did we missed in order to activate the process for germany?

 

Many thanks,
Sebastian

entry.title: XML contains errors and cannot be processed
entry.content:
Hi guys,

i am currently implementing SAP DRC E-Mail process for Germany and facing following error messages in edoc_cockpit:

These errors pop up when trying to submit the eDocument.

Can someone help me fixing the problem(s)?

entry.title: SAP eDocument Implementation for Germany
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

We would like to implement eDocuments in our system. Is it possible to do this without using Peppol (Sending and Receiving Invoices)?

Can anyone provide support in this situation with a step-by-step process, including which aspects need to be customized, which SAP notes have to be implemented, and so on?

Thank you.

entry.title: Transferring Measurement Document attachment to Notification
entry.content:
Hello fellow SAPiens:), 

I am currently working on the enhancement where the Plant Maintenance Notification is triggered when the Measurement Reading inside the Measurement Document (MD)is below the target reading in the Measurement Point (MP) by using User EXIT IMRC0001. This is supposed to happen when the MD is saved. This is all fine.

Another requirement is when the MD is saved the attachment inside the MD must also get transferred to the Notification 

How do I achieve this? Could anyone please provide me the details?

Regards

Deepak Doddagoudar

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud / Submitting Electronic Customer Invoices as a PDF with an embeded XML using E-Mail
entry.content:
Hallo Experts,
i have the following question regarding the implementation of the "Submitting Customer Invoices Using E-Mail (PDF/A-3)" Functionality in a Public Cloud System as part of Document and Reporting Compliance.
The goal is to be able to send an email including a PDF file, that has the XML file embedded similar to how its  descriped in this article for S/4HANA: Submitting Customer Invoices Using E-Mail (PDF/A-3) | SAP Help Portal.

Despite the Variety of block posts on the concepts of XRechnung and also ZUGFeRD, i was not able to find out if and how this goal can be implemented in a Public Cloud System in Germany.
What i have successfully implemented so far is the process of sending the customer the xml file in the XRechnung format via email (including the setup of peppol exchange etc.).
This currently results in one email with the invoice in a pdf format from output management and a second email send from the eDocument Cockpit with the xml.

As an additional information, our customer is based in germany.

I would greatly appreciate any help or ressources on how to accomplish this functionality of combining these two formats.

Best regards
Lukas

entry.title: How do we exclude the Accounting Documents having Nil Tax Codes (A0 or V0) in EDOC_COCKPIT ?
entry.content:
Hello Experts...

Greetings!!!

I have a Question related to EDOC_COCKPIT in the SAP system.

There are some Accounting Documents having Nil Tax Codes (A0 or V0) are getting moved under the EDOC_COCKPIT. Furthermore, when I'm trying to submit those Documents through EDOC_COCKPIT then it's showing me the below error:

No Relevant items found, atleast one item must be filled to generate IRN

Message No. EDOCUMENT_IN_EINV063

 

Is there any way to remove these Documents from EDOC_COCKPIT where Accounting Documents having Nil Tax Codes or is there any document for Step-by-step configuration of EDOC_COCKPIT from scratch?

 

Regards,

entry.title: TPAR Grant Configuration
entry.content:
We are going live shortly and haven't setup TPAR. We are hoping to mitigate risk by setting up Internal Orders for capturing transactions for TPAR related Grant transactions before go-live. I haven't been able to find any detail on the config requirements and am hoping that if we setup the required internal orders before go-live, this will mitigate the risk.

The key question is; does the config require an internal order for each grant or are the grants matched to a single 'TPAR Related Grant' internal order. Any other relevant considerations?

Appreciate any advice anyone from anyone who has configured the report before.

entry.title: EDocument Cockpit "Mapping Requested" Application Error
entry.content:
Hello Experts, I'm currently trying to implement the FI-Invoice in the eDocument Cockpit. 

Current State is the XML Generation/Preview with AIF. 

Im getting the following error :

Any idea how to fix this error? 

 

Br,
Pablo
